chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 3679 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.01.2018. Mr. Karim Bux Rind, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Assistant A.G. alongwith Atta Muhammad Dahri DSP Saeedabad, SIP Muhammad Laiq PS Sakrand, ASI Muhammad Zaman Jamali I.O. PS Butho District Matiari and ASI Ghulam Qadir PS Butho. = Mr. Mumtaz Sachal Awan, Advocate files power on behalf of the respondents 6 and 7, taken on record. Learned A.A.G. files comments on behalf of respondents No.1 to 5, which are taken on record, copies whereof have been supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioners. Petitioners are present. Petitioner No.1 claims to have married with the petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and choice. She further states that her relatives being annoyed upon her marriage with petitioner No.2, have lodged a false FIR No.11/2017 of P.S. Butho Forest, alleging therein that she was already married with one Muneer Ahmed who is the complainant of said FIR, therefore, they seek protection and quashment of the above FIR. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioners and I.O. is directed to record the statement of star witness of the incident namely Mst. Mirzadi u/s 161 Cr.P.C. only today in the office of the learned A.A.G. and place the same before concerned Magistrate for passing the appropriate orders. However, till then no arrest shall be made in the subject FIR. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
